prompt: Bridge release node where counter line is unsupported: choose action.
why_v1: When the pressure line runs out of room to continue, folding is cleaner than forcing more money into a losing spot.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This pressure line has run out of room, so folding is cleaner than forcing more money into a losing spot.

feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.call: Incorrect. Calling pays to continue a pressure line that has already run out of room, so folding is the cleaner release.
feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.raise: Incorrect. Raising forces even more money into a pressure line that has already run out of room, so this spot should just release.

feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Continuing here forces more money into a pressure line that has already run out of room, so folding is cleaner and the cleaner release.
